Rules: Supported Trading Products / Assets
Available asset classes, market specifications, and trading hours by product.

Updated over a week ago

Table of contents

We support instruments from the following exchanges: CME, COMEX, NYMEX, and CBOT.

The full list is below, but you can also check Tradovate's website for more details.

⚠️ Note: Silver (SI) here is the full-size 5,000 oz COMEX contract. The CME 1,000 oz Micro Silver (SIL) is not a Tradeify-supported product. There is no micro version of silver in our supported instruments — see the MICRO Futures table below.

⚠️ Note: MGC is E-Micro Gold, not silver. Do not confuse MGC (gold) with the unsupported Micro Silver (SIL). The only micro metal Tradeify supports is MGC. Never assume a micro version of a standard contract exists — only products listed in the tables above are supported.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Can I trade cryptocurrency or Bitcoin futures?

A: No. Tradeify does not support any cryptocurrency derivatives, including Bitcoin futures.

Q: Can I use the Tradovate API?

A: The Tradovate API is only available for LIVE funded accounts. It is not available for evaluation or sim funded accounts.

Q: Why does my P&L look different on EUREX products?

A: EUREX contracts are traded in euros but settled in USD. The currency conversion between EUR and USD explains any discrepancy you see between your trading P&L and your account balance.
